prompt_en: Cinematic Korean apocalypse opening for CH13 백색 야적장. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. Location mood: 냉동 컨테이너 통로, 적재 사무실, 백색 보관동. Show route pressure, practical survival gear, and incoming threat 백색 견인체. Grounded realism, no fantasy.
prompt_ko_context: 약과 증거, 누구를 위해 남겨진 물자인지를 판단한다.
camera_notes: wider negative space, slower pans, distance before impact. Start wide, move into corridor pressure, end on route decision beat.
audio_notes: Base cue echo_base. Layer alarm pulses, crowd pressure ambience, and metallic reverb.
